scope: Investigates the 3 unchecked_low_level_calls no_regression=False contracts from the full dry run; non-canonical evidence only.

reproduction_summary.method: Re-ran scan/remediate/rescan on the same three contracts from a clean tmp directory after the full dry run.
reproduction_summary.observed: The no_regression=False state did not reproduce; current runs returned no_regression=True for all three contracts, with differing HIGH/total counts on at least one contract.
reproduction_summary.interpretation: Evidence points to scan/rescan instability or environmental contention rather than a deterministic unchecked-call patcher compile/regression class.

code_change.purpose: Add RescanEvidence high_delta, total_delta, high_types_before, high_types_after, and new_high_types so future full dry artifacts explain no_regression failures.

next_loop: Run a small unchecked_low_level_calls rescan probe after this evidence change; inspect new_high_types if no_regression=False recurs.
